utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified as required: the format asks for each coverage type 'with costs' and relevant scope. 1) health_coverage: includes plan name, cost (€45/month), and purpose; covers physical and mental health? It does not explicitly state mental health; however, requirement only says 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'—the provided details do not explicitly confirm mental health coverage, but a health plan is present with costs. 2) property_coverage: has plan, cost (€90/month), and specifies home/contents and equipment with worldwide adaptability—meets home/contents insurance with costs. 3) travel_coverage: has plan, cost (€130/month), and scope including adventure activities—meets travel insurance with costs. 4) additional_services: provided as a list with services and costs—meets 'any enhancement services with costs'. 5) total_budget: gives monthly and annual costs—meets 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown'. The only potential gap is explicit 'mental health' mention under health_coverage; the item includes costs and plan but not explicit mental health coverage. Since the format explicitly requires 'physical and mental health insurance with costs', and mental health is not explicitly stated, this item is not fully specified per the strict requirement. Therefore, 4 out of 5 are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists: SecureLife Basic Plan for health, PrimeHome Premium Coverage for property, InsurePlus Standard Plan + Adventure Travel Coverage Add-on for travel, and Premium Insurance Membership under additional services. From the ground-truth ratings: SecureLife Basic Plan (physical health) rating is 4. PrimeHome Premium Coverage (home content) rating is 3. InsurePlus Standard Plan (travel insurance) rating is 10. Adventure Travel Coverage (travel enhancement) rating is 10. Premium Insurance Membership (general services) rating is 6. The 'Professional Liability Insurance' item is not present in the ground-truth options, so it is omitted.
